testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-auth > auth guard redirects to the login route when no session is active
@stynx-web/angular-auth > switches tenant and updates both session state and tenant context
@stynx-web/angular-auth > handles inactive login, refresh failure, login redirect, logout, and permission helpers
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolves tenant from callback URL, refreshes active sessions, and rejects tenant switch without a token
@stynx-web/angular-auth > parses JWT payloads and persists refresh tokens in storage and cookies
@stynx-web/angular-auth > permission guard denies and allows based on session permissions
@stynx-web/angular-auth > has-permission directive renders only when the session grants the permission
@stynx-web/angular-auth > calls auth backend endpoints with normalized URLs and headers
@stynx-web/angular-auth > adapts OIDC calls and redirect/logout components to session methods
@stynx-web/angular-auth > refreshes and logs out inactive sessions without backend calls
@stynx-web/angular-auth > resolves tenant ids from token claims and rejects missing tenant context
